editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.subtitle: Reports & Articles
editorial.description: Every image tells a story. Through my reports of Polynesian daily life — vibrant markets, authentic faces, moments of grace — I weave a visual narrative of the Fenua as it lives, breathes and transforms.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I offer
services.description: Photojournalist and full stack developer based in French Polynesia, I support you in your visual and digital projects.
services.cta_desc: Let's discuss your project together. I'll get back to you quickly.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Photojournalist · Full Stack Developer
about.bio1: Based in Faaa for many years, I am a photojournalist and full stack developer. Two seemingly opposite trades, but sharing the same requirement: attention to detail, precision of gesture and the search for meaning.
about.bio2: My lens rests on Polynesia and its people with a tender and authentic gaze. Morning markets, cultural ceremonies, stolen portraits, moments of life — I document the Fenua as it is, in all its raw and human beauty.
about.bio3: In parallel, I design web applications and digital interfaces for clients looking to combine technical performance with refined aesthetics.
